cards.name: Tyvar, Jubilant Brawler
cards.text:
You may activate abilities of creatures you control as though those creatures had haste.
+1: Untap up to one target creature.
−2: Mill three cards, then you may return a creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

cards.name: Glimpse of Nature
cards.text: Whenever you cast a creature spell this turn, draw a card.

cards.name: Heroic Intervention
cards.text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

cards.name: Veil of Summer
cards.text: Draw a card if an opponent has cast a blue or black spell this turn. Spells you control can't be countered this turn. You and permanents you control gain hexproof from blue and from black until end of turn. (You and they can't be the targets of blue or black spells or abilities your opponents control.)
